zh.lifeSummary: 當Aline de Pantulf於大約1225年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親Ives of Paunton26歲，母親Aline de Verdun62歲。她於1240年之前與Robert de Knightley III在英國斯塔福爾麗莉結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1302年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Aline de Pantulf was born about 1225, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ives of Paunton, was 26 and her mother, Aline de Verdun, was 62. She married Robert de Knightley III before 1240, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1302, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aline de Pantulf est née environ 1225, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ives of Paunton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Aline de Verdun, avait 62 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Knightley III avant 1240, à Knightley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1302, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aline de Pantulf um 1225 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ives of Paunton 26 und ihre Mutter Aline de Verdun 62. Sie hat vor 1240 in Knightley, Staffordshire, England Robert de Knightley III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1302 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aline de Pantulf è nata il circa 1225 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ives of Paunton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Aline de Verdun, aveva 62 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Knightley III prima del 1240, nel Knightley, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1302, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Aline de Pantulfが約1225年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ives of Pauntonは26歳，母Aline de Verdunは62歳であった。1240年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーでRobert de Knightley IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1302年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aline de Pantulf(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ives of Paunton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline de Verdun(은)는 62세였다. 그녀는 1240년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 Robert de Knightley III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aline de Pantulf nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ives of Paunton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Verdun, tinha 62 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Knightley III antes 1240, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1302, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aline de Pantulf родилась около 1225 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ives of Paunton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Verdun, 62. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Knightley III перед 1240 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1302 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aline de Pantulf nació aproximadamente 1225, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ives of Paunton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Aline de Verdun, tenía 62 años. Se casó con Robert de Knightley III antes de 1240, en Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1302, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
